questionText: An engineer models a stress load using 1(x - 2) = 3x. If a computer returns x = 4, is this value true or extraneous?
optionD: Extraneous: LHS=2, RHS=12, they are not equal
hint: Check: LHS = 1(4-2) = 2. RHS = 3(4) = 12. Since 2 ≠ 12, x=4 is extraneous. Actual solution: x-2=3x → -2=2x → x=-1
solutionExplanation: Check: LHS = 1(4-2) = 2. RHS = 3(4) = 12. Since 2 ≠ 12, x=4 is extraneous. Actual solution: x-2=3x → -2=2x → x=-1
